title: Epic Structures: Witch Huts
description: Replaces Witch Huts and makes them beautiful
body:
---

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff71a516d33860bd8a20c9bd813511828e386f8.jpeg)
This mod completely replaces and overhauls minecraft witch huts with mysterious castles and towers based on medieval architecture. All built using vanilla features only, meaning no custom blocks or entities included.
(FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK) 

Recommended mods to help with lag:
Enhanced Block Entities
ImmediatelyFast
Sodium
Entity Culling
FerriteCore
Chunky

---

![News](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8358365976066e665f97bc4c278144372634f1dc.jpeg)

🆕 Better world blending and more variation is planned

---

![Future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a1a01ad59534c63dba590aaa23a2e2a56e38f11.jpeg)

LIST OF MODS THAT ARE WORK IN PROGRESS:

✅ Epic Villages

✅ Epic Witch huts

✅ Epic Dungeons

✅ Epic Igloos 

🟨 Epic Jungle Temples

---

![compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26543443bf452e61e009408a57fd1e85b999f92.jpeg)

- ✅ Fully compatible with **Terralith**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **Regions Unexplored**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **Tectonic**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **Oh the Biomes We've Gone**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **Biomes O' Plenty**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **Geophilic**
- ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld **
- ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers’ Expanded Ecosphere**
